_comment: Provenance for every eval protocol. `origin` is 'curated' (written for this repo, modeled on real criteria, kept inside the EhrAttribute vocabulary) or 'clinicaltrials.gov' (verbatim eligibility section from a public NCT record). Real sections are hand-labeled under the convention documented in README.md: in-vocabulary numerics -> quantitative; concrete medical terms -> categorical; medical-but-unrepresentable criteria (out-of-vocab numerics, vague, compound OR-clauses) -> unparseable; purely administrative/logistical/temporal criteria -> omitted.
